full_text:
Gao Cheng 高承
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Cheng (高承)was born in Kuaiji. Local officer, sent by Sun Ce with tribute gifts to the Han court. Gao Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
